articles.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Lionel Messi joins Cristiano Ronaldo club, becomes 2nd player to score in 5 World Cups
articles.description: Lionel Messi achieved his 200th international appearance for Argentina in their FIFA World Cup 2026 opener against Algeria. At 38, he joins an elite group of footballers with such longevity. Messi's illustrious career includes a World Cup title, multiple Copa América triumphs, and numerous World Cup records, solidifying his status as one of football's greatest.

articles.description: Emma Raducanu has been linked to 32-year-old PR professional John Friend after the two were seen together in Battersea Park shortly after the Queen’s Club final. Friend works in corporate public relations and is not connected to professional tennis. Neither has confirmed a relationship, but the public outing has led to widespread speculation about Raducanu’s personal life.

articles.title: Royal Ascot 2026: day one horse racing updates – live
articles.description: Updates from the opening day of the royal meeting Greg Wood’s preview and tips | Mail Tony Hello and welcome to Ascot on day one of the Royal meeting 2026. The World Cup may be sucking a lot of the oxygen from the sporting atmosphere at the moment, but there’s an alternative global sporting highlight to enjoy right here in the UK – and there’s no need to take out a second mortgage or run the gauntlet of US immigration. Many of the finest racehorses on the planet will be racing in Berkshire this week, including fancied runners from Australia, Japan and the United States, and we are set-fair weatherwise for a memorable five days, too. The Arc winner, Daryz, is here on Wednesday, there are several fancied runners in the royal colours sprinkled across the first four days – including a favourite later on today’s card. Continue reading...

articles.description: Cape Verde's veteran goalkeeper Vozinha, 40, was overcome with emotion after a stellar Player of the Match performance against Spain, a 0-0 World Cup draw. Tears flowed not just from the historic result, but for his late grandparents and a mother unable to attend due to visa issues. His seven saves secured a memorable debut for his nation.
